title: Phase 2: Remove duplicate Stack and Lexer
description: Delete root stack.go (duplicate of internal/stack — only used by its own test). Move any useful stack_test.go tests into internal/stack/ or delete if redundant. Delete internal/lexer/ (identical copy of lexer/). Update any imports from internal/lexer to lexer/. Root lexer.go already re-exports from lexer/ so no change needed there. See docs/package-restructure-design.md Phase 2.
